sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ فَاطِمَةُ تُحِبُّ الطَّبْخَ مُنْذُ صِغَرِهَا.
sentences.translation: Fatima je voljela kuhati od malih nogu.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima loved cooking since she was young.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ مَعَ جَدَّتِهَا فِي الْمَطْبَخِ تَتَعَلَّمُ الْوَصَفَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Sjela je sa svojom bakom u kuhinji i učila recepte.
sentences.translationEn: She sat with her grandmother in the kitchen learning recipes.

sentences.arabic: عَلَّمَتْهَا الْجَدَّةُ طَرِيقَةَ طَبْخِ الْحَسَاءِ التَّقْلِيدِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Baka ju je naučila kako kuhati tradicionalnu supu.
sentences.translationEn: Her grandmother taught her how to make traditional soup.

sentences.arabic: طَبَخَتْ فَاطِمَةُ الْحَسَاءَ وَحِيدَةً لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ وَنَجَحَتْ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je sama skuhala supu po prvi put i uspjela je.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima cooked the soup alone for the first time and succeeded.
